name: Measurement Uncertainty Evaluation Tool v2.0
description: Enhanced Excel-based tool for ISO 15189 compliant measurement uncertainty calculations across multiple calculation modes.
objectives: Implement three calculation modes: s_wr + s_br, s_total/CV%, GUM bottom-up
Create automated Analyte Library with common analytes
Add visual dashboard for uncertainty trends
Enable batch uncertainty calculations for multiple analytes
timeline: Month 1: Design framework | Month 2: Formula implementation | Month 3: Testing and refinement | Month 4: Documentation
notes: Building on existing MU_Evaluation_Tool.xlsx and MU_Flex_v1.xlsx experience

name: Blood Gas Analysis Educational Deck
description: Comprehensive PowerPoint presentation covering blood gas parameters, acid-base mechanisms, compensation, and clinical case studies.
objectives: Create 8-10 slide deck with parameter explanations
Develop acid-base compensation flowcharts
Include 5-10 worked case examples
Produce both light and dark theme versions
timeline: Week 1-2: Outline and research | Week 3-4: Slide creation | Week 5: Case study development | Week 6: Review and refinement
notes: Target audience: laboratory technicians and students

name: Comprehensive Analyzer Database
description: Complete reference database for all laboratory analyzers with specifications, parameters, troubleshooting guides, and maintenance schedules.
objectives: Document 20+ analyzer models (Mindray, Roche, Abbott, Siemens)
Create standardized specification sheets
Build troubleshooting guides for common errors
Develop maintenance checklists and schedule templates
resourcesNeeded: Input from laboratory managers and technicians
timeline: Month 1: Collect specifications | Month 2: Create standardized templates | Month 3: Build troubleshooting guides | Month 4: Database integration
notes: Will be central resource for AS training and onboarding

name: Internal Quality Control (IQC) Dashboard
description: Interactive Excel dashboard for tracking and analyzing internal quality control data with Levy-Jennings charts and Westgard rules.
objectives: Create Levy-Jennings charting system
Implement Westgard multirule QC interpretation
Build trend analysis and alerts
Enable comparison between runs and reagent lots
timeline: Month 1: Design and templates | Month 2: Chart automation | Month 3: Alert system | Month 4: Validation
notes: Will integrate with lab LIS system eventually

name: Advanced Urinalysis Morphology Guide
description: Detailed reference guide for identifying and classifying all urinalysis formed elements with high-resolution microscopy images.
objectives: Catalog all RBC subtypes (isomorphic, dysmorphic, acanthocyte, etc.)
Classify all epithelial cell types with clinical significance
Document crystal types and formation conditions
Create flowcharts for differential diagnosis
notes: Used for training new laboratory staff on Mindray UA-5600

name: LIS-Based Autoverification Protocol Development
description: Design and implement autoverification rules in laboratory information system to reduce TAT and improve result quality.
objectives: Review CLSI autoverification guidelines
Develop laboratory-specific rules by analyte
Create delta check protocols
Implement reflex testing logic
Establish monitoring and audit trail system
timeline: Month 1: Guidelines review and planning | Month 2: Rule development | Month 3: Testing and validation | Month 4: LIS implementation
notes: Based on research from Thai institutions (Ramathibodi, Siriraj, Lopburi Cancer Hospital)
